formula: var x=parseFloat(inputs.valor)||0,m=parseFloat(inputs.media)||0,s=parseFloat(inputs.desviacion)||1;if(!s)return{error:true};var z=+((x-m)/s).toFixed(4);var percentile=+(0.5*(1+Math.erf(z/Math.sqrt(2)))*100).toFixed(2);return{z_score:z,percentile:percentile,classification:z>2?'Far above average':z>1?'Above average':z>-1?'Average':z>-2?'Below average':'Far below average'};
